narrative_beat: Robo dourado e vermelho-sangue em hospital P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid humanoid robot in profile view with dark gold and blood-red metallic body in thoughtful tilted-head pose surrounded by floating embers in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the robot's tilted head in thoughtful listening pose
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern hospital corridor with blurred nurses moving in background

composition.foreground: robot in vivid dark gold crimson

mood.emotion: machine as physician — Revelation authority over life and death

symbolism.primary: the robot-physician as image given authority over the living
symbolism.secondary: tilted head as mock empathy of artificial intelligence

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
